instruction: Building a boat step by step (step 1 of 6). The canvas is empty. Add the next part: polyline (points 8,108 24,104 40,108 56,104 72,108 88,104 104,108 120,104, fill none, stroke #3b82f6, stroke-width 2) with id "wave-1".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="8,108 24,104 40,108 56,104 72,108 88,104 104,108 120,104" />
</svg>
